_publications._publicationTitle: Sex Is a major determinant of neuronal dysfunction in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: male Nf1-CKO mice exhibited a 25% reduction in time spent and number of entries into the target quadrant relative to littermate controls (Fig 3C-F)
details: Male Nf1-CKO mice exhibited a 25% reduction in time spent and number of entries into the target quadrant relative to littermate controls
